# Coffee

On my days off I like to make coffee by hand. I grind the beans myself, mostly because the small ritual slows me down and I enjoy that.

I pour the water in a thin stream and watch the grounds rise and settle. When the smell fills the room I already feel content. To be honest I cannot really taste whether it is good or bad.

I am not doing anything clever. Still, a cup I took my time over always tastes better to me, and that is the part I care about.
